     the Fermi energy is    -0.3685 ev

!    total energy              =  -11771.72916335 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000007 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.08773365 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -11771.64142970 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -239737.74767485 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  120976.04321433 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4210.98735766 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  111204.07271990 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -3.02233142 Ry

     total magnetization       =    43.00 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    53.68 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  28 iterations
